description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with a medium build, wearing a sleeveless top and a fitted vest over it, paired with slim pants. The individual has a holster or pouch strapped to the right thigh and a belt with a prominent buckle. The footwear appears to be athletic shoes, and the person is accessorized with a headband. The hairstyle consists of medium-length dreadlocks that fall to the shoulders. The overall appearance suggests a casual yet practical urban style, suitable for walking or light activity.
description: An adult pedestrian with a sleeveless top, vest, slim pants, athletic shoes, and medium-length dreadlocks, accessorized with a thigh holster and headband.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless top, vest, belt, holster, and headband clearly, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the vest, holster, and the fall of the dreadlocks.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, the belt, and the full length of the dreadlocks.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the holster in more detail and the side profile of the outfit and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless top, fitted vest, slim pants, utility belt, and thigh holster
